constitution: All colonists have equal voice
Resources are shared by need
No colonist may be exiled without trial

meta_insight.insight: Recursive governance modeling shows: systems that allow sub-simulation of proposals before voting produce more stable outcomes than direct democracy alone
meta_insight.source_program:
(begin
            (define colony-year 70)
            (define unrest 0.000)
            (define morale 0.975)
            (define pop 11)
            (define governance-count 22)

            ;; Depth 1: model a governance proposal
            (define proposal-result
                (sub-s

sub_sim_log.label: governance-model
sub_sim_log.source: [begin, [define, citizens, [range, 1, 11]], [define, votes, [map, [lambda, [c], [if, [>, [random], 0.5], 1, 0]], citizens]], [define, approval, [/, [reduce, +, votes, 0], [length, citizens]]], [define, future, [sub-sim, 'consequence-model', [quote, [begin, [define, stability, 0.5], [define, years, [

child_logs.label: consequence-model
child_logs.source: [begin, [define, stability, 0.5], [define, years, [range, 1, 21]], [define, final-stability, [reduce, [lambda, [s, y], [+, [*, s, 0.9], [*, [random], 0.2]]], years, stability]], final-stability]

sub_sim_archive.label: governance-test-council
sub_sim_archive.source:
(begin
                    (define colonist-count 8)
                    (define avg-empathy 0.50)
                    (define unrest 0.01)
                    (define governance-score (* colonist-count 0.1))
                    (list colonist-count avg-empathy unrest))

sub_sim_archive.label: governance-test-commune
sub_sim_archive.source:
(begin
                    (define colonist-count 7)
                    (define avg-empathy 0.53)
                    (define unrest 0.01)
                    (define governance-score (- 1.0 unrest))
                    (list colonist-count avg-empathy unrest))

sub_sim_archive.label: governance-test-meritocracy
sub_sim_archive.source:
(begin
                    (define colonist-count 8)
                    (define avg-empathy 0.50)
                    (define unrest 0.04)
                    (define governance-score (if (> colonist-count 5) 0.7 0.3))
                    (list colonist-count avg-empathy unrest))
